title: Data Structures
origin: Work done for the course "Laboratory of Algorithms and Data Structures"
description: This projects implements various data structures with the aim of providing a simple and intuitive interface for each structure.

title: Connect Four
origin: Work done for the course "Laboratory of Operating Systems"
description: This project implements a multi-client server application that allows users to play the classic game Connect Four via a terminal interface. It leverages native GNU/Linux system calls for socket management and Docker for portability.

title: UniNaBugBoard26
origin: Work done for the course "Software Engineering"
description: UniNaBugBoard26 is a bug tracking and management system for software projects, designed to handle issue tracking, management, and resolution. It is built with Spring Boot and leverages cloud infrastructure such as AWS.

title: UniNaSwap
origin: Work done for the courses of "Object-Oriented Programming" and "Databases"
description: UniNaSwap is a system for exchanging, selling, and gifting items among university students, built on a layered architecture with a high level of abstraction and implementing the DAO pattern.
